name: Aunt Rose's Honeycake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a heat-resistant measuring cup that will hold more than 1 cup, add 1 heaping teaspoon each of nutmeg, allspice, cinnamon, and cloves. Add cocoa and enough boiling water to make just over a full cup. Set aside.
2. Sift flour, baking soda, and salt together.
3. Beat eggs in a mixer. Gradually add sugar, honey, and oil, beating well after each addition.
4. Alternately add the spice mixture to the egg batter with the sifted flour mixture.
5. Grease a tube pan or two loaf pans.
6. Top the cake with raisins and nuts that have been slightly coated with flour. Lightly cover these toppings with some of the batter.
7. Bake at 325°F for 1 hour or more until the cake is done. Makes 1 tube or 2 loaf cakes.
